title: Retrieving problems within a category
content: Use the 'getCategoryProblems' method to get a list of problem IDs belonging to a specific category. You must first obtain the correct 'category_id' by using the 'getCatalog' method. Provide the 'subject' and 'category_id' to retrieve the list of problem IDs.
examples: Show me all problem IDs under the 'Trigonometry' category in math.
List all problems in category 12345 for history.
Give me the first 20 problems from the 'Mechanics' category in physics.
